arts.ttl: Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target
arts.sum: Napoli received bad news about Karim Adeyemi and aren’t making progress for Alejandro Garnacho, so they are turning their attention to other wingers like PSV’s Noa Lang. The Dutch team is resisting for now, while the player is open to the move. The post Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk, Alisson, Luis Diaz, Ryan Gravenberch and Trent Alexander-Arnold are among the names absent from Liverpool's squad vs. PSV in the Champions League.
